title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 08 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 08 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 08 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/04/2025
Today, The DCE iron ore futures continued to fall sharply today. The most-traded contract rolled over to I2509, closing at 693, with a full-daydecline of 3.48%. Traders showed weak willingness to sell; steel mills were cautious and had moderate purchase willingness; market transaction sentiment was poor.
